heading: Regular Air Force and Space Force: gender-free basis for acceptance of original enlistments
label: 9132 Regular Air Force and Space Force: gender-free basis for acceptance of original enlistments
notes: CodificationAnother section 9132 was renumbered .section 9138 of this title

Amendments2023— struck out “Regular” before “Space Force:” in section catchline and “Regular” before “Space Force” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 118–312021— substituted “Regular Air Force and Regular Space Force: gender-free basis for acceptance of original enlistments” for “Regular Air Force: gender-free basis for acceptance of original enlistments” in section catchline and inserted “or the Regular Space Force” after “Regular Air Force” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 116–2832018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 8252 of this title1992— substituted “In” for “(a) Except as provided in subsection (b), in” and struck out subsec. (b) which read as follows: “Subsection (a) shall not apply with respect to an enlistment specified as being for training leading to designation in a skill category involving duty assignments to which, under , female members of the Air Force may not be assigned.”Pub. L. 102–484section 8549 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 100–456, div. A, title V, § 522(c)102 Stat. 1974Sept. 29, 1988“Such section [] shall apply with respect to persons accepted for original enlistment in the Regular Air Force after .”10 U.S.C. 8252September 30, 1989

Implementation, , , provided that:Pub. L. 100–456, div. A, title V, § 522(b)102 Stat. 1973Sept. 29, 1988“The Secretary of the Air Force shall develop a methodology for implementing , United States Code, as added by subsection (a), not later than .”section 8252 of title 10October 1, 1989

children.text: set a minimum or maximum percentage of persons who may be accepted for such an enlistment according to gender for skill categories or jobs; or
in any other way base the acceptance of a person for such an enlistment on gender.
